Class VectorIndex.VectorFieldBuilder

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.data.mongodb.core.index.VectorIndex.VectorFieldBuilder
Enclosing class:
VectorIndex
public static class VectorIndex.VectorFieldBuilder extends Object
Builder to create a vector field
Since:
4.5
Author:
Christoph Strobl, Mark Paluch

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    VectorIndex.VectorFieldBuilder
    cosine()
    Use similarity based on the angle between vectors.
    VectorIndex.VectorFieldBuilder
    dimensions(int dimensions)
    Number of vector dimensions enforced at index- and query-time.
    VectorIndex.VectorFieldBuilder
    dotProduct()
    Use similarity based on both angle and magnitude of the vectors.
    VectorIndex.VectorFieldBuilder
    euclidean()
    Use similarity based the distance between vector ends.
    VectorIndex.VectorFieldBuilder

    Quantization used.

    Quantization used.

    Similarity function used.

    Similarity function used.

  • Method Details

    • dimensions

      @Contract("_ -> this") public VectorIndex.VectorFieldBuilder dimensions(int dimensions)
      Number of vector dimensions enforced at index- and query-time.
      Parameters:
      dimensions - value between 0 and 4096.
      Returns:
      this.

    • cosine

      @Contract(" -> this") public VectorIndex.VectorFieldBuilder cosine()
      Use similarity based on the angle between vectors.
      Returns:
      new instance of VectorIndex.

    • euclidean

      @Contract(" -> this") public VectorIndex.VectorFieldBuilder euclidean()
      Use similarity based the distance between vector ends.

    • dotProduct

      @Contract(" -> this") public VectorIndex.VectorFieldBuilder dotProduct()
      Use similarity based on both angle and magnitude of the vectors.
      Returns:
      new instance of VectorIndex.

    • similarity

      @Contract("_ -> this") public VectorIndex.VectorFieldBuilder similarity(String similarity)
      Similarity function used.
      Parameters:
      similarity - should be one of euclidean | cosine | dotProduct.
      Returns:
      this.
      See Also:
      • VectorIndex.SimilarityFunction
      • similarity(SimilarityFunction)

    • similarity

      @Contract("_ -> this") public VectorIndex.VectorFieldBuilder similarity(VectorIndex.SimilarityFunction similarity)
      Similarity function used.
      Parameters:
      similarity - must not be null.
      Returns:
      this.

    • quantization

      public VectorIndex.VectorFieldBuilder quantization(String quantization)
      Quantization used.
      Parameters:
      quantization - should be one of none | scalar | binary.
      Returns:
      this.
      See Also:
      • VectorIndex.Quantization
      • quantization(Quantization)

    • quantization

      public VectorIndex.VectorFieldBuilder quantization(VectorIndex.Quantization quantization)
      Quantization used.
      Parameters:
      quantization - must not be null.
      Returns:
      this.
